narrative:
Marysville 9 (precinct in Union County) has 1,267 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.6 percentage points.
